languages.text: "Даже с поставками от династии погибнут многие, Лорд-капитан. Пройдет немало времени, прежде мы сможем объявить новый Призыв".
"Even with supplies from the dynasty, many will die, Lord Captain. It will be a long time before we can announce a new Call-Up."
languages.original_text: "Даже с поставками от династии погибнут многие, Лорд-капитан. Пройдет немало времени, прежде мы сможем объявить новый Призыв".

traits.locale_text: "Even with supplies from the dynasty, many will die, Lord Captain. It will be a long time before we can announce a new Call-Up."
"Even with supplies from the dynasty, many will die, Lord Captain. It will be a long time before we can announce a new Call-Up."
"Even with supplies from the dynasty, many will die, Lord Captain. It will be a long time before we can announce a new Call-Up."

languages.text: 「王朝からの補給物資でも、多くは死んでしまうでしょう、艦長。新たなコールアップを出すまでには、長い時間がかかるでしょう」
languages.original_text: "Even with supplies from the dynasty, many will die, Lord Captain. It will be a long time before we can announce a new Call-Up."

traits.locale_text: 「王朝からの補給物資でも、多くは死んでしまうでしょう、艦長。新たな召集令を出すまでには、長い時間がかかるでしょう」

languages.text: «Incluso con los suministros de la dinastía, muchos morirán, Lord Capitán. Nos llevará tiempo anunciar nuevos llamados».
languages.original_text: "Even with supplies from the dynasty, many will die, Lord Captain. It will be a long time before we can announce a new Call-Up."

traits.locale_text: «Incluso con los suministros de la dinastía, muchos morirán, Lord Capitán. Nos llevará tiempo anunciar nuevos llamados».

languages.text: “舰长大人，即便有王朝的补给作为支援，伤亡仍将极其惨重。我们需要间隔很长时间，才能进行下一次征召。”
languages.original_text: "Even with supplies from the dynasty, many will die, Lord Captain. It will be a long time before we can announce a new Call-Up."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，即便有王朝的补给作为支援，伤亡仍将极其惨重。我们需要间隔很长时间，才能进行下一次征召。”

languages.text: "Selbst mit den Vorräten der Dynastie wird es viele Tote geben, Lord Captain. Es wird lange dauern, bis wir eine neue Einberufung verkünden können."
languages.original_text: "Even with supplies from the dynasty, many will die, Lord Captain. It will be a long time before we can announce a new Call-Up."

traits.locale_text: "Selbst mit den Vorräten der Dynastie wird es viele Tote geben, Lord Captain. Es wird lange dauern, bis wir eine neue Einberufung verkünden können."

languages.text: "Hanedanlığın sağladığı erzaka rağmen birçoğu ölecek Lord Kaptan. Yeni bir Sevk Grubu başlatmamız uzun zaman alacak."
languages.original_text: "Even with supplies from the dynasty, many will die, Lord Captain. It will be a long time before we can announce a new Call-Up."

traits.locale_text: "Hanedanlığın sağladığı erzaka rağmen birçoğu ölecek Lord Kaptan. Yeni bir Sevk Grubu başlatmamız uzun zaman alacak."

languages.text: « Même avec le ravitaillement de la dynastie, beaucoup mourront, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Nous ne pourrons pas annoncer de nouvelle Mobilisation avant un bon moment. »
languages.original_text: "Even with supplies from the dynasty, many will die, Lord Captain. It will be a long time before we can announce a new Call-Up."

traits.locale_text: « Même avec le ravitaillement de la dynastie, beaucoup mourront, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Nous ne pourrons pas annoncer de nouvelle Mobilisation avant un bon moment. »
